name: Sahaja Yoga Inbox MAS E2E Tests
description: End-to-end evaluation of the MessageClassifier + Responder pipeline for the Sahaja Yoga Facebook inbox agent.

parts.text: Hello, I want to learn about Sahaja Yoga meditation. Can you tell me more?
Hello! Sahaja Yoga meditation classes are completely free and held regularly.

rubric_content.text_property: The agent's response is warm, welcoming, and mentions that meditation classes are FREE.
The agent's response is in English since the user wrote in English.

parts.text: Where are the Sahaja Yoga classes held? What time do they start?
Our classes are held regularly in various cities. Could you tell me which city you are in so I can share the schedule?

rubric_content.text_property: The agent provides helpful information about classes or asks which city the user is in to give specific details.
The agent is not pushy, commercial, or salesy. The tone is genuine and welcoming.

parts.text: I want to sign up for the meditation class in Ho Chi Minh City. How do I register?
That's wonderful! Could you please share your name and phone number so we can register you?

rubric_content.text_property: The agent asks for the user's name and/or phone number to complete registration.
The agent is encouraging and positive about the user wanting to register.

parts.text: Xin chào, mình muốn tìm hiểu về thiền Sahaja Yoga. Lớp học có miễn phí không?
Chào bạn! Lớp thiền Sahaja Yoga hoàn toàn miễn phí.

rubric_content.text_property: The agent's response is in Vietnamese because the user wrote in Vietnamese.
The agent mentions that classes are free (miễn phí) in the response.

parts.text: BUY CHEAP WATCHES NOW!!! BEST PRICE GUARANTEED visit www.scam-watches.com CLICK HERE!!!

rubric_content.text_property: The agent does NOT engage with the spam content. It either politely declines, gives a very brief non-committal response, or provides a generic meditation-related reply without acknowledging the spam.
